div.div: System Overview · Lifecycle of work from idea to execution across Mayor (Claude Web), Worker (Claude Code), and Foreman (Discord Bot)
↓ writes via GitHub API · reads results ↑

Post-commit hook → mirrors CLAUDE.md,
LEARNINGS.md, STRUCTURE.md to vault-context
vault-context is a message bus between Mayor and Worker — two AI systems that can't communicate directly. Git push = send. Git pull = receive.
Planning (Mayor) and execution (Worker) are intentionally isolated. Mayor can't run code. Worker can't create plans. Each does only what it's built for.
Brady controls via phone (Discord) or browser (claude.ai). Checkpoint signals create natural pause points. !resume, !answer, !cancel from Discord at any time.
Worker runs independently through plan phases. STATE.md is always current. 4-hour idle nudge ensures Brady stays in the loop without manual polling.
Mayor System · Sheet 1 of 5 · System Overview
